name: Chocolate Intrigue
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt. Set aside.
2. Cream the butter and sugar until light and fluffy. Blend in the eggs, milk, and vanilla extract.
3. Gradually add the sifted dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring continuously until well combined.
4. Pour 2/3 of the batter into a greased tube pan. Stir in the chocolate syrup and baking soda with a spatula, then pour over the remaining batter in the pan.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 45 minutes.
6. Loosely cover the top of the cake with aluminum foil and continue baking for an additional 25 minutes.
7. Allow the cake to cool completely before removing it from the pan.
This recipe is quick, easy, delicious, and visually appealing when sliced. It originally appeared in "The Rochester Hadassah Cookbook."
